name: Rice Croquettes W/Parsley Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Prepare sauce: Heat butter over low heat until melted. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until smooth and bubbly; remove from heat. Stir in milk and parsley. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir 1 minute. Keep warm.
Croquettes: Heat oil in a skillet. Mix rice, cheese, parsley, pepper, onions, and 1 egg in a large bowl. Mix remaining egg and milk in a small bowl. Shape the rice mixture into 12 ovals, using about 1 tablespoon per oval. Dip into egg mixture; coat with breadcrumbs. Fry 2-3 minutes per side. Drain.
This was really a nice meatless main dish but needs 2-3 servings of vegetables around it to round it out as a meal. I had to thicken the sauce a bit more and made 7 medium-sized oval croquettes.
